creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Krusader2.x compiles and works with KDE4. As long as KDE3 and 4 are supported, 
both krusader versions (1.x and 2.x) should co-exist in the ports tree. 
Therefore I have created a new port instead of just an upgrade from the 
existing x11-fm/krusader port

Fix: 

--Boundary-00=_RZR4JQbEKmVYTQe
